framework.name: WIMSE Proof Tokens for agent application-layer auth
framework.description: The draft specifies WIMSE Proof Tokens (WPTs) and HTTP Message Signatures as the application-layer authentication mechanisms for agents, noting limitations of transport-layer (mTLS) alone. WIMSE is an active IETF working group — this draft builds on it rather than competing.
framework.raw_quote: 9.2.1. WIMSE Proof Tokens (WPTs)... 9.2.2. HTTP Message Signatures

source.title: draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00 - AI Agent Authentication and Authorization
